text: Statistical anomaly detector flagged an unusual sensor pattern on DEERE-7R-014, but no hard safety threshold was breached. Likely sensor noise or a borderline reading -- no confirmed fault, recommend routine monitoring rather than immediate action.

Oil pressure of 36 kPa is well below the ~340 kPa baseline for 2141 rpm, consistent with oil pump wear, low oil level, or a relief-valve fault. Recommend immediate oil level/pump inspection before continued operation.
